channel.title: M. Farstad | Full Stack Software Developer
channel.description: Recent content on M. Farstad | Full Stack Software Developer

item.title: termdbms
item.description: A terminal user interface for SQLite that allows for viewing, querying, editing, and creating copies.

item.title: Vivamus Lacus Mauris
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit. Impedit, rerum voluptates veniam. Esse, nihil, ea, eaque, quos cum id tempore voluptate nisi nemo debitis impedit officiis culpa repellat voluptatum in aperiam error quo minima ratione ex pariatur maxime eligendi dolore nesciunt molestiae enim alias atque commodi delectus perferendis. Blanditiis, iste placeat nostrum in! Eligendi, omnis, unde, quos ullam nesciunt molestias quis a saepe nisi distinctio molestiae voluptate obcaecati officiis consequuntur similique aspernatur rerum sequi placeat iure quaerat itaque libero officia recusandae ad corrupti aperiam cum beatae.
I specialize in desktop and mobile applications, microcontrollers, and real-time embedded systems. I combine efficiency and robustness with a beautiful user experience.

item.title: Desktop Applications
item.description: I’ve built single-page and multiple-page applications on Windows and Linux. Use cases range from administrative assistance to machine learning to music composition. And that’s just the software I was paid to write.

item.title: Embedded IOT
item.description: Label printer emulators, smart vending machines, Touch-screen UI, master/slave MCU message passing, and ultra-low-latency audio are just a few of the direct contributions I have made in my career.

item.title: Mobile Applications
item.description: By leveraging Flutter I target both Android and iOS at once. I can build mobile apps for any business need, without sacrificing appearance or user experience.
